report.summary: Audited aztec-network-guide for UX/accessibility issues; created static OG image (1200x630 SVG+PNG) with privacy shield visualization and key stats; added ToC aria-label, mobile table scroll min-widths for all 3 tables, WebkitOverflowScrolling for smooth iOS scrolling, switched from dynamic /api/og to static PNG, and updated OG alt text with descriptive metrics.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added aria-label='Table of Contents' to ToC nav on aztec-network-guide for screen reader accessibility
Changed ToC container from <div> to semantic <nav> element for proper landmark navigation
Added min-width: 480px to PXE vs AVM comparison table (3 columns) for proper mobile horizontal scroll
Added min-width: 420px to AZTEC Tokenomics table (2 columns) for mobile scroll support
Added min-width: 560px to competitors comparison table (4 columns: Aztec vs Zcash, Monero, Tornado Cash, Railgun) for mobile scroll
Added WebkitOverflowScrolling: touch to all 3 table scroll containers for smooth iOS scrolling
Switched aztec-network-guide OG from dynamic /api/og endpoint to static PNG for faster social card rendering
Updated OG image alt text to be descriptive with key metrics (3,500+ sequencers, $350M FDV, Ignition Chain, TGE dates)

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: aztec-network-guide (1200x630) — SVG + PNG with indigo/purple/cyan gradient, privacy shield visualization with lock icon, ZK proof radiating nodes (PXE, ZK, L2, ETH), 4 stat cards (Sequencers 3,500+, Pre-Sale Raised 19,476 ETH, Token Sale FDV $350M, Max Supply 10.35B), PXE→ZK Proof→Ignition Chain→Ethereum L1 flow diagram, topic pills (Noir Language, Dual State Model, AZTEC Token, TGE Feb 2026)

sections.title: Files Modified
items: src/app/learn/aztec-network-guide/page.tsx — Added ToC aria-label + semantic <nav>, 3 tables with min-width + WebkitOverflowScrolling, switched to static OG PNG, updated alt text

sections.title: Files Created
items: public/og-aztec-network-guide.png — OG image PNG for social sharing
